name: Baked Potato Spears
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the potatoes and cut them lengthwise into thick slices.
2. Cut the slices into thick strips.
3. Brush the potato strips with the salad dressing.
4. Place the strips on a greased jelly roll pan, seasoning to taste with onion salt and pepper.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 50 minutes or until tender and golden brown.
NOTE:
The recipe can be doubled for an entertaining snack or to serve with hamburgers or bratwurst.
